blockers.required: Production identity provider, issuer/JWKS or equivalent validation configuration, and credentials
Authorized server runtime capable of protecting session secrets and private provider credentials
Deny-public private object storage with tenant/customer namespaces and signed-download support
Upload quarantine and malware scanning provider/workflow
Rick selects and connects Stripe, Square, or PayPal provider-hosted payment flow
Production domain, secure cookie, CSRF, CSP, rate limiting, monitoring, and audit retention configuration
Cross-tenant, cross-customer, guessed-ID, direct-link, expired-session, upload, download, and mobile tests in the selected production stack
Runtime-specific rollback point and tested restore procedure

nextExecutableStep: Select the production provider/runtime stack and supply credentials outside the repository.
